race.comment: ISLAND DEC (5) appreciated the step-up in trip third-up with a comfortable win over 1200m at Canterbury in good time. Proven in all conditions and looks hard to stop from the right gate. ZOUNAKA (6) reliable mare expected to go close with Stanley's 3kg claim. No match for Smashing Time second-up when she stalked the speed to run second over this track and trip. Hard to hold out. AGAINST THE LAW (12) frustrating gelding who deserves another chance with the 3kg claimer aboard out to the 1200m. Comes here in peak condition and stays in the mix. NULLARBOR JANE (13) comes off a let-up after she worked hard early before tiring to run seventh over 1100m at Warwick Farm in easier grade with the 57kg. Maps well in this stronger race. Place best. HARLEX (4) holding his form on the provincial circuit and he gets a much better set-up today with the good weight drop. Don't dismiss. The chances don't end there.
